news.headline: AI makes insane prediction for when Elon Musk will hit trillionaire status as his net worth reaches $850 billion
news.content:
AI makes insane prediction for when Elon Musk will hit trillionaire status as his net worth reaches $850 billion

Elon Musk has been the richest man in the world for some time now, but in recent months his net worth has ballooned beyond expectations, making it a real possibility that he hits trillionaire status sooner rather than later.

Just five years ago, despite the success of [Tesla] and [SpaceX], controversial billionaire [Elon Musk] was worth ‘only’ [$24.6 billion], yet in the years since he has established himself as the man to beat [when it comes to individual wealth].

There was a brief moment last year when Larry Ellison’s brief success [saw him overtake Musk], but that lasted for a matter of days before the [tech] mogul reasserted his dominance — and the gap has only grown since then.

According to real-time data from [Forbes], Musk’s current net worth sits at a staggering figure of $845 billion: nearly two and a half times greater than his 2025 end total, and more than the next three richest people on the list combined.

Elon Musk's net worth now sits at $845 billion, which is considerably more than anyone else in history (Andrew Harnik/Getty Images)

This is primarily down to growth experienced by both Tesla and SpaceX – the latter of which recently had a new price valuation – with Musk holding 15.73% and roughly 43% of each company respectively.

Musk’s ownership of [artificial intelligence] company xAI is also playing a key role in his growing wealth, as Grok continues to expand, [picking up key government contracts] in the process.

While $845 billion is more money than anyone has ever had in history, all eyes are firmly fixed on that trillion dollar mark, with many speculating how long it’ll take before it’s reached.

[ChatGPT] has offered its own bold prediction for this, estimating that it could be as early as this year which certainly isn’t hard to believe considering the rate Musk’s wealth has grown in recent months.

It offered a 75% chance th

# Elon Musk replies to world's first trillionaire post, says have little cash, it is all ...

Comments

Share

AA

+Text Size

- Large
- Medium
- Small

Elon Musk

Tesla CEO Elon Musk has finally addressed the speculation about his growing fortune. Musk noted that his $849.3 billion net worth is overwhelmingly tied to his ownership stakes in Tesla and SpaceX. Responding to a post on X about wealth creation, Musk said he has already created wealth “thousands of times over.” He added: “My ‘net worth’ is almost entirely due to my ownership stakes in Tesla and SpaceX. I have <0.1% that is cash.”

## Elon Musk addressed speculation about his growing fortune

A post shared by Kalshi (web-based prediction market platform) shared a post on X (formerly known as Twitter) in which it claimed that there are 75% chances of Elon Musk becoming a trillionaire this year. Responding to the post, Musk wrote “Already have thousands of times over. My “net worth” is almost entirely due to my ownership stakes in Tesla and SpaceX. I have <0.1% that is cash. Tesla and SpaceX employees all receive stock/options and Tesla is >80% owned by retail investors and index/pension funds, so value increases apply >80% to them.” Musk emphasised that employees at both Tesla and SpaceX receive stock and options, while Tesla itself is “>80% owned by retail investors and index/pension funds.”

His comments highlight how his fortune is largely paper wealth, dependent on the valuation of his companies rather tha
